backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (UserProfile, Event, Booking, Review, EventPhoto, OrganizerProfile, etc.), persistent storage maps, and public query/update methods for a FIESTA event planning platform with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old actor/organizer profile types and a no-op `run` function for handling persistent state schema upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features related to separating event photos from portfolio images across OrganizerCard, EventPhotoLightbox, OrganizerDashboard, and OrganizerProfileView components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the FIESTA app, mounting the React app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, guest, organizer, admin) wrapped in a Layout that includes Header, Footer, and a conditional ProfileSetupModal for new users.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsC: Reusable card component for displaying a single analytics metric with an icon, label, value, and optional description.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsD: Admin analytics dashboard that fetches organizer and event data to display summary cards for total organizers, total events, most popular event type, and highest-rated organizer.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, clears the React Query cache on logout, and renders distinct styles for each state.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that collects a new user's full name and email to create their profile, using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingR: A dialog that lets a guest select one of their existing events and submit a booking request to a specific organizer, then redirects to the bookings page on success.
frontend/src/components/booking/GuestBoo: Renders a list of booking cards for a guest, each fetching and displaying the associated event's details (date, location, guests, style, contact) alongside booking status.
frontend/src/components/booking/Organize: Displays a single booking request for an organizer with event details and approve/reject action buttons that call the `useUpdateBookingStatus` mutation.
Renders an organizer's bookings split into 'Pending Requests' and 'Past Bookings' sections, delegating each item to `OrganizerBookingCard`.
frontend/src/components/events/CreateEve: A form for guests to create a new event by selecting type, date, location, style, guest count, and contact number, with past-date validation before calling `useCreateEvent`.
frontend/src/components/events/EventList: Displays a list of event cards showing each event's type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number formatted from nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A simple footer component showing the copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Responsive site header with navigation links for authenticated users (My Events, Find Organizers, My Bookings, Organizer Dashboard) and a login button, supporting both desktop and mobile (hamburger) layouts.
frontend/src/components/organizer/EventP: Displays a grid of event photos with hover zoom effect and a keyboard-navigable lightbox modal for full-size viewing.
A dialog-based lightbox component that fetches and displays an organizer's event photos with thumbnail strip navigation and keyboard arrow-key support.
Allows organizers to upload and delete event photos, showing upload progress and rendering existing photos in a responsive grid with hover-reveal delete buttons.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Organi: Card component displaying an organizer's profile summary (portfolio preview, stats, availability) with buttons to view their work photos and open a booking request modal.
Sortable table comparing multiple organizer profiles by rating or experience, with a Book Now action that opens a booking request modal for the selected organizer.

A form component for creating or editing an organizer profile, with fields for company name, contact, experience, pricing, description, and availability status, using React state and a save mutation hook.
A read-only display component for an organizer's profile, showing stats (experience, reviews, pricing, contact), description, and a portfolio gallery using card-based UI.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Portfo: A gallery component that displays organizer portfolio images in a grid with thumbnail previews and a lightbox dialog for full-size viewing with prev/next navigation.
A component for uploading and deleting organizer portfolio images, supporting file selection, upload progress state, and a grid preview of existing images with delete-on-hover.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor, waiting until the actor is ready before querying.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing login, logout, and identity persistence via DFINITY's AuthClient with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, organizer profiles, portfolio images, events, bookings, and reviews using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines a navy/gold themed CSS variable system for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that renders the AnalyticsDashboard component, redirecting non-admin or unauthenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/GuestBookings.tsx: Authenticated guest page that fetches and displays the current user's bookings via GuestBookingList, redirecting unauthenticated users to home.
Authenticated guest page showing a two-column layout with a CreateEventForm and an EventList of the user's existing events.
frontend/src/pages/GuestOrganizerBrowsin: Authenticated page that lists all organizers in a responsive grid using OrganizerCard components and supports viewing an organizer's portfolio via EventPhotoLightbox.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, feature cards, and a CTA section; shows navigation options based on authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerBookingManag: Authenticated organizer page that fetches and displays incoming booking requests via OrganizerBookingList with a back-navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerComparison.t: Authenticated page that reads organizer IDs from URL search params and renders a side-by-side OrganizerComparisonTable for the selected organizers.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: React page for the organizer dashboard that displays and manages an organizer's profile, portfolio images, and event photos in separate sections, with edit/create profile functionality gated behind Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/ui/button.tsx: Reusable Button component built with class-variance-authority, supporting multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, etc.) and sizes, with optional Radix UI Slot rendering via asChild.
frontend/src/ui/card.tsx: Collection of composable Card UI components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction) using forwardRef and cn utility for className merging.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Utility functions for converting PortfolioImage filenames and EventPhoto/ExternalBlob objects into displayable URLs, supporting HTTP, blob:, and data: URL formats via IC canister streaming.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (navy, gold, semantic tokens), fonts, shadows, border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a 'Find Organisers' platform with known issues around portfolio images incorrectly appearing in event photos sections, and pending/active feature requests to separate the two data types and surface event photos to customers.
